description: Style Note With a minimalistic and simple design, this jet black wallet by provogue speaks for itself. Using pure leather, this wallet does more than just storing your money and credit cards -  its minimalistic design adds a heightened vibe of sophistication.  Product Details Black leather wallet with white stiched loops at perimeter Red interiors with two main compartments, eight card holder slots and slip pockets Brand logo on the right side in the front Material and Care 100% Leather Wipe surface with dry clean cloth to avoid dust and stains Do not store in direct sunlight Size and Fit Height: 9cm Width: 14 cm Style NoteWith a minimalistic and simple design, this jet black wallet by Provogue speaks for itself.
